pi_items.source: task.json metadata matches task description requirement
Direct SQL query execution: UNION ALL of Customer table (59 rows) + Employee table (8 rows) = 67 rows verified against Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite from official GitHub repository
PRAGMA table_info analysis: Customer and Employee tables both contain FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone columns. ContactType is a calculated column (literal 'Customer' or 'Employee')

Verified against actual Chinook database downloaded from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite. Data matches exactly: 59 customers, 8 employees, UNION ALL produces 67 rows.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official Chinook sample database from lerocha/chinook-database (GitHub). The database contains 59 Customer records and 8 Employee records. A UNION ALL query combining FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone from both tables plus a calculated ContactType column produces exactly 67 rows. All columns (FirstName, LastName, Email, Phone) are present in both Customer and Employee tables with NVARCHAR types. The expected query name 'AllContacts' aligns with task requirements.
